temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a dimly lit, narrow alley at night, a man in a grey suit holds a clear bottle of liquor. He is surrounded by several other men. One man in a striped shirt stands to the left, while another in a dark shirt is on the right. A bright, red and white neon sign with Chinese characters is visible in the background, casting a faint light on the scene. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and mysterious atmosphere, introducing a group of men in a confrontational or secretive situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A fast-paced, percussive, and tense musical score begins, creating a sense of urgency and action.)
(00:03-00:05) The man in the grey suit, who was previously holding a bottle, is now seen from behind. He is being grabbed from behind by another man, and his face is contorted in a pained or strained expression as he is pushed or pulled away. (Storyline: The scene escalates from a tense standoff to a physical confrontation, showing that the man in the grey suit is in a vulnerable and dangerous position.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, percussive music continues, heightening the drama of the physical struggle.)
